assets.caption: Binance P2P public interface showing the Buy flow for USDT with USD selected. Rates and payment methods vary by country, seller, and time.
assets.alt: Binance P2P interface with Buy selected, USDT active, USD selected, filters visible, and seller names masked.
assets.claimSupported: Binance has a public P2P interface where users can view USDT offers, fiat filters, payment methods, and seller terms before opening an order.
assets.approvalNotes: Owner approved the full_interface candidate because it shows the P2P section header, Buy/Sell toggle, USD selector, USDT selection, filters, and offer rows. Promoted Ad row is visible and must not be described as a typical or best rate.
assets.notes: Promoted (high-markup) Ad row visible at top — never present its rate as typical/best. Merchant names blurred, avatars masked, no CNY, no login, no order opened. Not yet added to contextualScreenshotSlots (requires explicit render-wiring task).
